prompt: One of my parallel agents failed midway through. I have evidence from 2 other agents. Can I merge the reports, or do I need to rerun all 3?
expected_output: Should explain incomplete evidence = overall FAIL verdict (per aggregation rules). Should advise running only the failed agent again (file ownership ensures clean isolation), then re-aggregating all 3 verdicts. Should clarify that partial success is not acceptable for deployment decisions.
